---
title: "Project Summary"
author: 
  - name: "Vishwajeeth R. Pagala" 
  - name: "Zuo-Fei Yuan"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y %b %d')`"
format:
  pptx:
    reference-doc: StJude_template.pptx
    output-file: Quarto_test3
---

## Overview of Project

```{r results='asis'}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| warnings: false

## GENERATE QC PLOTS
source("C:/Users/sbyrum/OneDrive - St. Jude Children's Research Hospital/Documents/Development/DIANN/proteoDA/proteoDA_params.R")
# DiaNN quan output
setwd(working_dir)

results <- readRDS("results.rds")

num_prot_samples <- dim(results$data)
num_prot <- num_prot_samples[1]
num_samples <- num_prot_samples[2]
num_groups <- unique(results$metadata$group)
comparisons <- results$design$contrast_vector

#numbers <- list(num_prot, num_samples, num_groups, comparisons)
#cat(paste('-', numbers), sep='\n')
cat(paste('-', "Number of samples =",num_samples),sep='\n')
#cat(paste('-', "Group =",num_groups),sep='\n')
cat(paste('-', "Number of quantified proteins =",num_prot),sep='\n')
cat(paste('-', "Comparison:",comparisons),sep='\n')

```

## Protein Intensities Across Samples

![](C:/Users/sbyrum/OneDrive - St. Jude Children's Research Hospital/Documents/Development/DIANN/proteoDA/01_QC/Boxplot_allsamples.png)

## Total Protein Intensities

![](C:/Users/sbyrum/OneDrive - St. Jude Children's Research Hospital/Documents/Development/DIANN/proteoDA/01_QC/Barplot_split_allsamples.png)

## Principal Component Analysis PC1 and PC2

![](C:/Users/sbyrum/OneDrive - St. Jude Children's Research Hospital/Documents/Development/DIANN/proteoDA/01_QC/PCA_PC12.png)

## Principal Component Analysis PC3 and PC4

![](C:/Users/sbyrum/OneDrive - St. Jude Children's Research Hospital/Documents/Development/DIANN/proteoDA/01_QC/PCA_PC34.png)

## Clustered Dendrogram 

![](C:/Users/sbyrum/OneDrive - St. Jude Children's Research Hospital/Documents/Development/DIANN/proteoDA/01_QC/Dendrogram_byGroup.png)

## Proteins with Missing Values

![](C:/Users/sbyrum/OneDrive - St. Jude Children's Research Hospital/Documents/Development/DIANN/proteoDA/01_QC/Heatmap_MissingVal_allsamples.png)

## Differential Abundance Summary

```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| warnings: false

source("C:/Users/sbyrum/OneDrive - St. Jude Children's Research Hospital/Documents/Development/DIANN/proteoDA/proteoDA_params.R")
# DiaNN quan output
setwd(working_dir)

DA_sum <- read.csv(file=file.path(DA_dir, "DA_summary.csv"))
knitr::kable(DA_sum)

``` 



```{r, include = FALSE}
myplots1 <- list()
for (i in 1:length(results$results)){
  png_file <- file.path(names(results$results)[i], "-volcano-adjusted-pval", fsep="")
  png_file2 <- file.path(working_dir, DA_dir, "static_plots", png_file, fsep = "/")
  png_file3 <- file.path(png_file2, "_1.png", fsep="")  
  #print(png_file2)
  #print(png_file3)
  
  myplots1 <- append(myplots1, png_file3)
  
  
 #knitr::include_graphics(png_file3)
}
#myplots <- noquote(myplots)
#print(myplots)
index1 <- 1:length(myplots1)

```


```{r Vol_adjusted, include = TRUE}
#| output: asis

res <- purrr::map_chr(index1, \(index1) {
  knitr::knit_child(text = c(
    "## Volcano Plots - Adjusted p-values",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "![](`r as.character(myplots1[index1])`)",
    ""), envir = environment(), quiet = TRUE)
    })

#res <- knitr::knit_child(text = src, quiet = TRUE)
cat(res, sep = '\n')
```



```{r, include = FALSE}
myplots <- list()
for (i in 1:length(results$results)){
  png_file <- file.path(names(results$results)[i], "-volcano-raw-pval", fsep="")
  png_file2 <- file.path(working_dir, DA_dir, "static_plots", png_file, fsep = "/")
  png_file3 <- file.path(png_file2, "_1.png", fsep="")  
  #print(png_file2)
  #print(png_file3)
  
  myplots <- append(myplots, png_file3)
  
  
 #knitr::include_graphics(png_file3)
}
#myplots <- noquote(myplots)
#print(myplots)
index <- 1:length(myplots)

```

```{r vol_raw, include = TRUE}
#| output: asis

res <- purrr::map_chr(index, \(index) {
  knitr::knit_child(text = c(
    "## Volcano Plots - unadjusted p-values",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "![](`r as.character(myplots[index])`)",
    ""), envir = environment(), quiet = TRUE)
    })

#res <- knitr::knit_child(text = src, quiet = TRUE)
cat(res, sep = '\n')
```
